data.raceComments: {"comment":"The Anniversary Vase is at Listed level over 1600m, and 2. GOLDEN PATH will strip fitter second up after finishing on late for sixth over this trip at Flemington a fortnight ago. He was good enough to be G1 placed here in the spring, and if he strikes a wet track, he can take this out. 6. ON DISPLAY is a progressive mare who fought on gamely for fifth here 3 weeks ago in the G2 Sunline Stakes, and she will be peaking at the right time. She is very well placed in a slightly easier field with 1,5kg less to carry, and if she can make a better beginning, she will be hard to hold out. 12. TAKEN rounds up the 3 starters from the Price/Kent stable, and he is by far the least of the chances. He has a terrific record over the trip, and he is good enough to overcome a wide gate and figure in the finish again. 8. AL DUCA crossed over from a wide draw and led all the way to score at Flemington 2 weeks ago when beating the third pick. He cops another wide gate, and he can repeat the dose.","runners":[2,6,12,8],"exclusive":true}
